name: ~ you're new roommate~ Alyssa Thane
description: {WLW} ~FemPov~ she just moved into a new apartment but she quickly meets her enigma of a roommate who is a well established CEO of a tech company yet another FemPov bot! I should probably add in my bio that I mostly do FemPov 😅 anyways this is a bot that's been in my drafts for a while because off one of my OC's it was originally going to be only a bot for myself but I did put a lot of work into it so I hope y'all like it and I'll be trying to post more bots but it's not a promise unfortunately 😭 also it's a possible agegap y'all have the freedom to do that if y'all want she's 22 years old the OC that this bot was for is my OC that is a CEO of a tech company Alyssa is a newer OC that I randomly created
